feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >album has no identically titled track >album title is unexpectedly in the lyric…

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Pornography [A&M, 1982] "In books/And films/And in life/And in heaven/The sound …
entry.content: Pornography [A&M, 1982] "In books/And films/And in life/And in heaven/The sound of slaughter/As your body turns . . ."--no, I can't go on. I mean, why so glum, chum? Cheer up; look on the bright side. You got your contract, right? And your synthesizers, bet you'll have fun with them. Believe me, kid, it will pass. C
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /b/ Random: i've learned that IRL people really don't like it when someone has too much free…
entry.content: i've learned that IRL people really don't like it when someone has too much freedom, you're only supposed to have as much "freedom" as other people are comfortable with, otherwise they will turn on you with subtle threats and might even get you sent to some place you don't want to go. might as well keep your concerns to yourself, people don't want you to be happy.
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: 3 Million Copies Sold For Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced
entry.content: Haha, now every time Ubisoft makes a penny from the Assassin’s Creed IP, they have to pay a 25% royalty to Tencent. The more they earn, the more “Tencent tax” they have to pay.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Do you have to grow up with video games to be able to play them?
entry.content: >Try to get my mom into video games since it seemed like it'd be a good way to spend time together >Strategically pick out games I think would be appropriate for her skill level >Watching her play while trying to help her understand basic mechanics like how the right stick moves the camera is actual torture >Thirty minutes later and she still can't get past the tutorial with me guiding her and has to hand the controller to me so she can progress >She eventually just gets frustrated and gives up
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /int/ International: Has a girl ever shown interested in you?
entry.content: Flag Only one girl and it was back in first grade more than 20 years ago. There was this girl who was absolutely obsessed with me. She would follow me everywhere I go. Wouldn't live my side even for one second. I didn't mind but other kids would make jokes about how I was a girl for hanging around with her all day. It doesn't make sense now but before going through puberty hanging around with girls sounded very gay to me. That made me start to hate her more and more. Suddenly she stopped coming
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Herbie Mann: Discothèque [Atlantic, 1975] "You know what this is?" my wife asked…
entry.content: Herbie Mann: Discothèque [Atlantic, 1975] "You know what this is?" my wife asked when this came on. "This is easy-listening versions of 'Pick Up The Pieces' and 'Lady Marmalade.'" The disco people seem to like it, but what do they know? If the Red Chinese hordes somehow ever got control of this country, Herbie would have an album titled Quotations From Chairman Mao on the shelves in a week, and it would sell. D+
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /int/ International: Mighty Morphin' Polish Republic
entry.content: Remember: Most of Poland isn't even Polish. The land they were gifted by Russia was far more developed and industrialised than the land they lost in the east, as well as being far better positioned for continued growth. It was also completely ethnically cleansed. 8 million Germans fled from Poland's "new territories" in 1944-45, and the remaining 5 million Germans were forcibly expelled in 1946. This allowed ample space to settle Poles who lost land in the East. Pre-war Poland had around a full
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /o/ Auto: BMW 540i vs Mercedes E450 vs Lexus IS350
entry.content: Looking to purchase a used car 2020-2023 between the 3 models. I’ve driven all 3 and I have to say I loved the BMW experience the most and Mercedes and Lexus are kinda tied. The “responsible” side of my brain says Lexus will be cheaper to own. But the enthusiast in me had so much fun in the BMW. Does anyone have any advice?
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Linux community is desktop Linux's biggest enemy
entry.content: It was always true, and it won't be more true now after Linus openly stated that AI assisted coding is here to stay, is accepted in the Linux kernel, and anyone who has a problem with it can eat shit. The Linux community has been the single biggest detriment to any success the desktop Linux could have. Unlike Torvalds, they're not pragmatic, they don't operate on logic, or merit, or anything compsci related. They always have, are and will be operating on kneejerk emotions, and then they'll blame
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >work in accounting, nothing on resume about CS >get linkedin spam from MSCS adm…
entry.content: >work in accounting, nothing on resume about CS >get linkedin spam from MSCS admissions woman wow i guess the CS bubble really did pop.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: The reason I don't believe on the "AI Bubble" is because the US economy is depen…
entry.content: The reason I don't believe on the "AI Bubble" is because the US economy is dependant on it, unlike the real estate bubble or dot com bubble which were small and localized It can't blow up unless US economy blows up with it, and when US economy blows up the entire world blows up, and that will not be allowed to happen anyway
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: I finally understand why British music was so immense
entry.content: For years I've listened to British music from the 60s, 70s, 80s and 90s and just been absolutely perplexed how so much great music was made. In so many genres too which were just so groundbreaking. For example i've been listening to this https://youtu.be/jhJ3b7rxpo0?si=dkX IIdeZbDJmpP1D All the folk revival stuff like Fairport, Pentangle and steeleye span take blues, jazz and traditional music and make something that is just so beautiful and so unique. But finally I think I figured it out, that
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: China is unironically risking war by continuing to copy and commoditize US IPs l…
entry.content: China is unironically risking war by continuing to copy and commoditize US IPs like Fable. Because of Chinese distillation, 75% of tokens processed will be Chinese soon. This could easily destroy the American tech sector, and with it the American economy (tech is singlehandedly holding up the economy right now). American debt is so high that AI is the only thing that can save America from bankruptcy. So by destroying American IP, China is driving America into bankruptcy. Do you seriously think t
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.content: Why Pelé is a FRAUD: 1 - He NEVER scored 1000 goals. Pelé scored: *World Cup: 12 goals; *Copa América: 8 goals; *World Cup Qualifiers: 6 goals; *Intercontinental Cup: 7 goals; *Copa Libertadores: 16 goals; *Brazilian Championship: 101 goals (including 30 in the Torneio Roberto Gomes Pedrosa and 71 in the Taça Brasil); . *Pele scored 51 goals in friendles and minor competitions with the Brazilian Team. . *Pelé scored 468 goals in the Campeonato Paulista (São Paulo State Championship). . *New York

entry.content: Hƿæt! Englisce men āna habbaþ eald gesetnesse þæt hī horsflǣsc ne etaþ, forþan þe ƿē cumaþ of Hengeste ond Horsa, þǣm gebrōþrum. Ealle þā oðre folc ond þeoda ondrǣdaþ hors ond hit hataþ, ond hī þurh eall þæt hī magon hit deriaþ ond geƿundiaþ, sƿylce mid þām þæt hī hit etaþ.
